email_verification_success: Email verified. You may now login.

send_verification_link: A verification link has been sent to your email
email_verify_intro: Thank you for registering on Crafts Platform. To activate your account, please click the following button:

email_footer_contact: If you encounter any issues, reply to this email.

email_news_footer: Follow us for the latest offers and news.
